who: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 pay slips/month
offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 pay slips/month, manual formatting causes payment delays. We streamline pay slip generation instead of manual formatting in spreadsheets.
problem: Converting raw payroll hours into formatted pay slips efficiently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers using QuickBooks
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Community forums where freelancers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and template selection for pay slips
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
